title: coprosmanthus tamnifolius
intro: Coprosmanthus tamnifolius, also known as Storax tree, is a plant species in the family Storaceae, native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coprosmanthus tamnifolius include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Coprosmanthus tamnifolius include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
